title: wedelia camporum
intro: Wedelia camporum, also known as Camfield or Wedelia, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Wedelia camporum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Wedelia camporum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
